task.en: Two files are on the Desktop: `invited.txt` (everyone invited to the offsite) and `rsvped.txt` (everyone who has already RSVP'd). Open both. Then in Notes, create a single new note titled exactly `Awaiting RSVP` whose body lists, one name per line, each person who was invited but has NOT yet RSVP'd. Do not add any other notes.

pre_command:
UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; mkdir -p "$HOME/Desktop"; printf 'Jim Halpert
Pam Beesly
Dwight Schrute
Angela Martin
Kevin Malone
Oscar Martinez
' > "$HOME/Desktop/invited.txt"; mkdir -p "$HOME/Desktop"; printf 'Pam Beesly
Kevin Malone
Oscar Martinez
Jim Halpert
' > "$HOME/Desktop/rsvped.txt"; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1;
grading_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null | grep -qF 'Awaiting RSVP' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Awaiting RSVP"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'Dwight Schrute' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Awaiting RSVP"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'Angela Martin' && echo True || echo False

B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Awaiting RSVP"' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$B" ] && ! echo "$B" | grep -qiE 'Pam Beesly|Kevin Malone|Oscar Martinez|Jim Halpert'; then echo True; else echo False; fi

source.note: Re-grounded onto native macOS apps; concept port, not a literal import.
